info.description: Backend API engine for Flownatty platform.
info.title: Flownatty Backend API

get.description: Get all users with pagination and search (Admin only)

parameters.description: Search by name, email, or phone
parameters.name: search

get.description: Get statistics about users (total, consumers, business owners)

post.description: Send OTP to user's email for password reset
Authenticate user by email. Sends 2FA OTP to email.
Revoke refresh token. For web: uses cookie. For mobile: send refresh_token in body.

parameters.description: Refresh token (required for mobile, optional for web)
parameters.name: request

post.description: Get a new access token. For web: uses refresh token from cookie. For mobile: send refresh_token in body.

parameters.description: Refresh token (required for mobile, optional for web)
parameters.name: request

post.description: Register a new user with phone, email, and password. Sends OTP via email.
Resend OTP to the user's email for registration
Verify the OTP sent to user's email for two-factor authentication and issue access tokens
Verify the OTP sent to the user's email and create the account

get.description: Get the authenticated user's primary business
Get all businesses the authenticated user belongs to
Search for businesses by name or category
Get all members of a business

post.description: Add a user as a member of a business (owners only)

put.description: Update a member's role in a business (owners only)

delete.description: Remove a member from a business (owners only)

business_type.description: Business fields (required if role is business_owner)

name.description: REMOVE: UserID field - now in BusinessMember

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and the JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
